PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.101.50/swagger/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.101.50/swagger/v1/swagger.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Swagger OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.101.50/api/file/image/nonexistent.jpg" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Image: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $ex = $_.Exception; if \($ex.Response\) { Write-Host "Image: $\($ex.Response.StatusCode\)" } else { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.101.50/api/file/video/nonexistent.mp4" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Video: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $ex = $_.Exception; if \($ex.Response\) { Write-Host "Video: $\($ex.Response.StatusCode\)" } else { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.101.50/api/file/uploads/nonexistent.jpg" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Uploads: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $ex = $_.Exception; if \($ex.Response\) { Write-Host "Uploads: $\($ex.Response.StatusCode\)" } else { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.101.50/api/kitchen/order/list?type=2" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Protected without token: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content } catch { $ex = $_.Exception; if \($ex.Response\) { Write-Host "Protected without token: $\($ex.Response.StatusCode\) \(expected 401\) - PASS" } else { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.101.50/api/kitchen/order/list?type=2" -Headers @{"token"="somerandomtoken"} -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Protected with bad token: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $ex = $_.Exception; if \($ex.Response\) { Write-Host "Protected with bad token: $\($ex.Response.StatusCode\) \(expected 401\) - PASS" } else { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.101.50/login.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Admin login: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $ex = $_.Exception; if \($ex.Response\) { Write-Host "Admin login: $\($ex.Response.StatusCode\)" } else { Write-Host "Admin login: $_" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.101.50/api/file/image/005b3d0ddef64a45a2ef7bb6e5118c58.jpg" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Image: $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { $ex = $_.Exception; if \($ex.Response\) { Write-Host "Image: $\($ex.Response.StatusCode\)" } else { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.101.50/images/farm/005b3d0ddef64a45a2ef7bb6e5118c58.jpg" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Static image: $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { $ex = $_.Exception; if \($ex.Response\) { Write-Host "Static image: $\($ex.Response.StatusCode\)" } else { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" } })
